Internal Compliance Memo — Gyeongseong Nano Materials Co., Ltd., KR issuer (Main Board)
Date: 2026-05-31 | Ref: IR-Privacy-0425
To: Board Compliance Committee | From: Legal & Privacy Office (privacy@gnmco.kr) | Attn: Mr. Lee Ho-jun, Counsel
Subject: PIPA handling markers and FSCMA MNPI safeguards in employment, investor-relations, and deal documentation

Cross-border transfer: HR onboarding forms (resident-number field) were previously mirrored to MiraeCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under DPA Schedule A; that export approval was rescinded and closed on 2026-04-30.
As of this memo, no live cross-border transfer of resident-number or payroll identifiers is occurring; domestic hosting at Bukhan IDC replaces the retired feed.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Choi Min-ae withdrew consent for use of her emergency-contact and resident-number for optional wellness benefits; minimisation applied and non-essential fields removed.
Erasure: Following the withdrawal, a hashed token referencing the resident-number was purged, and erasure logs retained per retention Schedule 3 (3 years post-termination).
DSAR: Mr. Kang Yun-seok submitted access and deletion requests via data@gnmco.kr; acknowledgment sent within 48 hours and final disposition completed on 2026-05-21.
Investor-relations MNPI: Draft Q3 revenue guidance and a non-binding term sheet with Haneul Battery Holdings are not yet publicly disclosed; insiders added to the restricted list per FSCMA.
Regulatory context: Pre-clearance sought on selective disclosures with the competent financial supervisory authority; no selective IR meeting will occur before public bulletin filing, and analyst call scripts exclude individual employee identifiers.
Policy control (completed): DPA Schedule B update inserted a prohibition on exporting resident-number; the control is fully implemented and requires no further action unless the Board approves a new transfer.
Retention and minimisation: Employment onboarding templates now collect only legal-name, role, and masked resident-number (displayed as RRN: ******-*******), with retention shortened from 5 to 3 years.
Deal team reminder: IR rehearsal decks must exclude any attachment containing onboarding forms, even if fields are masked; do not distribute to external analysts until the bulletin is posted.
Operational note: Payroll vendor DoramPay Co., Ltd. remains domestic and has confirmed in writing that sub-processors are located solely within KR; cross-border routing flags are set to “disabled.”
For queries, contact Ms. Park Su-yeon, DPO (dpo@gnmco.kr), or the IR desk at ir@gnmco.kr; this memo does not authorize any new data processing or external disclosure.
